name: Syscache — Object Table (Win7 XP)
categoryDescription: Program execution evidence beyond the Uninstall/Amcache layer — BAM, SRUM, Syscache, and configuration affecting execution artifacts.
description: Syscache.hve (a separate hive at Windows\AppCompat\Programs\Syscache.hve on Win7) records SHA1 hashes of executed programs — Windows 7/XP era predecessor to Amcache.
forensic_value: Windows 7 execution history with SHA1 hashes — functionally similar to Amcache but for older OS versions. Parse with RegRipper on the Syscache.hve hive directly.
